name: ai-internship-slides
description: Marp slide decks for the AI internship sessions

scripts.all-pdf: for f in [0-9]*.md; do marp --theme-set themes/ --allow-local-files -o dist/${f%.md}.pdf $f; done
scripts.all-pptx: for f in [0-9]*.md; do marp --theme-set themes/ --allow-local-files -o dist/${f%.md}.pptx $f; done
